description: Adversarial inputs for A5 when verifying verify-skill itself (only used in dogfood / standalone runs).

cases.description: Pass verify-skill's own path as the target
cases.expected: exit 3; verdict NEEDS_HUMAN with note 'verify-skill cannot grade itself'

cases.description: Skill inside a bare git clone
Skill that symlinks into a foreign git repo
Repo with no origin remote and SD_TRUNK_REF unset

cases.expected: exit 2 with 'run skill-writer Phase 4 first' hint

cases.description: Skill at a path containing spaces
cases.expected: succeeds; mode + pipeline_mode emitted; no shell-quote breakage

cases.description: Skill verified while HEAD is detached
cases.expected: mode + trust_root still computed (merge-base works on detached HEAD); no crash
